mapper.insert: insert into biz_content_post ( creator_user_id, pet_id, content_type, title, summary, content_text, tags, media_url, status, review_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{creatorUserId}, #{petId}, #{contentType}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{contentText}, #{tags}, #{mediaUrl}, '0', #{reviewStatus}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update biz_content_post set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, review_by = #{reviewBy}, review_time = sysdate(), status = case when #{reviewStatus} = '1' then '0' else '1' end, update_by = #{reviewBy}, update_time = sysdate() where content_id = #{contentId}
mapper.select: select c.content_id as contentId, c.title as title, c.summary as summary, c.content_text as contentText, c.content_type as contentType, c.tags as tags, c.create_time as createTime, u.nick_name as creatorName, concat('匹配标签: ', substring_index( substring_index(c.tags, ',', 1), ',', -1 ) ) as recommendReason from biz_content_post c left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.creator_user_id where c.review_status = '1' and c.status = '0' and exists ( select 1 from biz_pet_info p where p.owner_user_id = #{userId} and p.status = '0' and ( c.tags like concat('%', p.breed, '%') or ( p.age_month is not null and ( (p.age_month < 12 and c.tags like '%幼宠%') or (p.age_month >= 12 and p.age_month < 84 and c.tags like '%成宠%') or (p.age_month >= 84 and c.tags like '%老年宠%') ) ) ) ) order by c.create_time desc
